title: tanacetum montanum
intro: Tanacetum montanum, also known as Mountain Tansy or Tanacetum, is a flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Tanacetum montanum include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and easing menstrual cramps, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Tanacetum montanum is commonly used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be dried and used in potpourri blends.
